provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall reptilian alien Veshan in full ceremonial armor — black iron ancestral plate with gold and crimson enamel depicting battle victories, a tall decorated crest-cap, a blood-crimson formal cloak trimmed in gold, honor tokens polished for once, this is a house celebration and even the armor looks like it has been cleaned, which for a Veshan is the equivalent of a formal suit
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Cross-faction comparison subject. Faction-appropriate costume for the specified role, useful for teaching same-role-different-faction visual discrimination.
